benevole.highlight: Would you like to become a volunteer? Contact us!

quiSommesNous.introPara1: The Ostwald Socio-Cultural Centre is a place of encounter, exchange and solidarity, open to all residents. Our mission is to foster social bonds, support everyone in their daily lives and offer cultural, educational and social activities accessible to all. Through our actions, we support families, young people and isolated individuals, while promoting local initiatives. Thanks to the commitment of our team, volunteers and partners, we work every day to build a dynamic, inclusive and welcoming space in the heart of the city.
quiSommesNous.intro2: CSC Ostwald, approved by CAF since December 2022, is a place open to all residents.
quiSommesNous.axe1: Strengthen autonomy, access to rights and civic involvement.
quiSommesNous.axe2: Make the social centre a local driver of ecological transition and social cohesion.
quiSommesNous.axe3: A Centre managed by and for residents.
quiSommesNous.axe4: Promote co-education: strengthen links between families, school and children.
quiSommesNous.axe5: Support parenting in all its dimensions.
quiSommesNous.equipeIntro: The CSC is made up of permanent staff, the users’ association and committed volunteers.
quiSommesNous.equipeErreur: The team list could not be loaded. Please try again later.
quiSommesNous.reseauDesc: The Departmental Union CSF of Bas-Rhin brings together 11 local teams spread across 4 territories of the department.
quiSommesNous.conseilTitre: Board of Directors of the Users' Association
quiSommesNous.conseilDesc: The association is managed by a board of directors, elected each year at the General Assembly. For any question or information request, you can contact the board of directors at the following address:
quiSommesNous.conseilCta: Would you like to join the association and/or become a board member? Contact us!

famille.heroIntro: Parent-child workshops, outings, shows, listening sessions… Our centre creates warm gatherings to reconnect, learn and be surprised, at any age.
famille.rdvDesc: Experiences to live, side by side. Find our weekly gatherings to strengthen the bond between parents, children and neighbours. Short, friendly and inclusive formats — so the joy of meeting up is within everyone’s reach, without any barriers.
famille.renseignement: For any questions, information, registrations or appointment requests, contact Charline

jeunesse.heroSubtitle: Empowering young people to flourish, get involved and be supported in their projects
jeunesse.rdvDesc: Led by Aurélie VERNIER, youth animator, our youth section is a welcoming space dedicated to teenagers in Ostwald aged 11 to 17. Once registered, young people can take part in activities, workshops, outings and events!
jeunesse.renseignement: For any questions, information, registrations or appointment requests, contact Aurélie
jeunesse.heroIntro: Do you have an idea spinning in your head? Something you’d like to organise, create or change, but you don’t know where to start? The centre is here for that!
jeunesse.erreur: The workshops could not be loaded. Please try again later.

nosActions.intro: This space is a living reflection of our ambitions: here, our goals turn into concrete actions. From sharing to personal fulfilment, we cultivate social cohesion through wellbeing workshops, cultural outings and intergenerational encounters. Each project is an invitation to forge bonds, express oneself and explore new horizons. Step behind the scenes of our daily life and discover how, hand in hand, we revitalise our territory.
nosActions.bienEtreDesc: We offer weekly yoga, sophrology and relaxation workshops open to all residents. These wellbeing moments allow everyone to take care of themselves, recharge and meet new people in a supportive and accessible environment. Whether you are a beginner or experienced, our facilitators welcome you enthusiastically.
nosActions.sortiesDesc: CSC regularly organises outings to theatres, museums, concerts and local festivals. These cultural excursions are an opportunity to discover the artistic richness of our region, open up to new forms of expression and share experiences that strengthen bonds among residents.
nosActions.numeriqueDesc: In an increasingly connected world, we support residents with their online administrative procedures: creating an Ameli account, filing taxes, accessing digital public services. Trained volunteers are available to help you, at your own pace, without judgement.
nosActions.animationsDesc: Family outings, board games, parent-child workshops, hands-on activities… Our family activities create spaces of sharing and togetherness. They are aimed at all parents who want to spend quality time with their children while meeting other families in the neighbourhood.
nosActions.intergenDesc: We believe in the richness of exchanges between generations. Our intergenerational events bring young and elderly people together around cooking, gardening, games or life story workshops. These encounters foster mutual respect, transmission and the fight against the isolation of the elderly.
nosActions.ctaTexte: To register or ask about specific schedules, please contact the CSC team. We’ll be happy to welcome and assist you.

projets.heroIntro: Do you have a project close to your heart? Whether it’s for yourself, your neighbourhood or your friends, CSC Ostwald supports you from idea to reality.
projets.ideeIntro: There are no ’small’ ideas. Whether it’s for the neighbourhood, your friends or yourself, anything is possible:
projets.sportDesc: Organise a football or basketball tournament.
projets.cultureDesc: Set up a concert, photo exhibition or graffiti workshop.
projets.loisirsDesc: Plan a trip or a specific outing.
projets.digitalDesc: Launch a YouTube channel or podcast at the centre.
projets.etapesIntro: No need to arrive with a 50-page file! We move forward together step by step:
projets.pitchDesc: You come to see us and tell us your idea (even if it’s still a bit vague).
projets.organisationDesc: We help you ask the right questions (What? When? With what budget?).
projets.coupDePouceDesc: Handle administrative procedures, we provide our equipment and reserve a suitable room for your meetings or events.
projets.realisationDesc: It’s your project, but we stay by your side to make it a reality.
projets.premiersIntro: That’s normal! Just ask yourself these three questions before coming to see us:
projets.q2: Who wants to do it with me?
projets.q3: What do I need most to get started?
projets.actionIntro: Come and discuss it with the animation team! We’re here to listen to all your suggestions, without judgement.
projets.quandVal: Contact us to make an appointment.
projets.avecQuiVal: The animation team or a supervisor
projets.ctaFinal: Don’t let your idea gather dust, come and bring it to life!

contact.heroSub: A question, a project, a desire to get involved? Our team is here for you.
